case_title: WINCHELL RONALD C. VS BRASSO RUSSELL F. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,440.00 FILED BY WINCHELL RONALD C. AS TO DEFENDANT BRASSO RUSSELL F. FOREMAN RONALD D. FOREMAN AND BRASSO ATTONEY AT LAW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRASSO RUSSELL F.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FOREMAN RONALD D.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FOREMAN AND BRASSO ATTONEY AT LAW
TO PAY SAID SUM AS FOLLOWS:$1440 ON OR BEFORE 7/28 94, RECPT OF WHICH IS HEREBY ACKNOWLEDGED,$1090.00 ON OR BEFORE 8/28/94, $1000. ON OR BEFORE 9/28/94.
IT IS FURTHER STIP THAT THE PLFT SHALL HOLD SAID JUDGMENT SO LONG AS DEFTS MAKE PAYMENTS SET FORTH HEREIN ABOVE. SHLD DEFTS FAIL TO MAKE SAID PAYMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WINCHELL RONALD C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRASSO RUSSELL F. FOREMAN RONALD D. FOREMAN AND BRASSO ATTONEY AT LAW $3,530.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,530.00, IT IS HEREBY STIPULATED THAT PLFT SHALL HAVE JUDG- MENT AGAINST DEFTS IN THE SUM OF $3530 DEFTS AGREE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
